ApnaDoodh is Gurugram's largest direct dairy marketplace. Browse verified local farmers near you, compare raw testing logs, and purchase dairy directly from the source.

Delivering To

Sector 46, Gurugram

Fresh Dairy Products
From Trusted Local Farmers

Discover verified dairy farmers near you, compare products, read reviews, and order directly from the source. ApnaDoodh connects you straight to certified family farms, ensuring unadulterated cold-chain delivery within 12 hours of milking.

Explore FarmersBecome a Seller

100% Quality Audited

Every farmer is subject to 40+ daily chemical lab tests for fat, SNF, and contaminants.

Traceable Origins

View veterinary registers, cattle health stats, and feed records of your chosen farmer.

Direct Farmer Payouts

No distributors or middlemen. 100% of product prices go directly to local producers.

Cattle Well-being First

Our partner farms prioritize open pastures, organic grazing, and zero synthetic hormones.

Fresh From Pasture

Platform Core Values

Why Choose ApnaDoodh

Enjoy premium unadulterated dairy straight from local family farms, delivered with traceability and care.

Verified Farmers

Only verified and trusted local dairy vendors those who meet our quality standards and adhere to ethical practices.

Farm Fresh Products

Fresh milk and dairy products sourced directly from local farms to ensure maximum freshness and quality.

Fair Prices

Transparent pricing with no unnecessary middlemen to reduce costs of dairy products.

Secure Payments

Safe online payment with trusted payment gateways to ensure transaction security.

Fast Local Delivery

Quick doorstep delivery from nearby farmers so you get your fresh dairy products fast in the comfort of your home that too early morning.

Trusted Reviews

Verified customer reviews and transparent ratings to help you make informed decisions.

Pure Source Traceability

Meet Our Heritage Farmers

We bypass collection centres. Your milk is sourced from specific, audited family-run farms in Gurugram, tested in real-time, and delivered directly to you.

Traceability Lifecycle

How ApnaDoodh Works

A transparent connection from India's green pastures straight to your doorstep bag.

01

Find Farmers

Browse verified local farms nearby and learn about their cow breeds and organic pastures.

02

Compare Reviews

Compare direct customer feedback and daily lab-verified chemical fat/SNF purity logs.

03

Order Products

Add organic A2 milk, hand-made paneer, or set dahi from your preferred farm to your cart.

04

Receive Delivery

Our temperature-locked cold courier fleet drops off your order quietly before 7:00 AM.

For Dairy Farmers

Are You a Local Dairy Farmer?

Set your own prices, showcase pasture reports, and reach thousands of conscious Gurugram buyers. ApnaDoodh handles early morning cold-chain collection and deliveries, paying you daily with zero hidden commissions.

Onboard Your Farm
Mobile App Coming Soon

Our Mobile App Is Coming Soon

Order fresh dairy products anytime, anywhere. Experience unadulterated cold-chain delivery management directly in your pocket.

Real-time Order Tracking

Follow our morning cold courier dispatch route in real time.

Live Delivery Updates

Get SMS and push notifications at door drop, with bottle exchange logging.

Easy Subscriptions & Reordering

Manage calendars, pause milk delivery for holidays with one tap.

Secure One-Tap Payments

Auto debit via UPI, credit cards, or integrated ApnaDoodh wallet.

Soon

Customer Love

What Our Buyers Say

Read stories from local Gurugram families who order fresh dairy directly from vetted farmers.

“Switching to ordering from Govardhan pastures on ApnaDoodh has been the best decision for my family. The cow milk is rich, clean, and tastes exactly like what I used to get from my grandparents' farm. Direct delivery from Sohna Valley is incredibly fast.”

Rohan Sharma

Verified Buyer (Gurugram)
